changes: Added Atlas, Command, Promoter, and Foundry continuation reason fields to AtlasRecommendationReconciliationPacket.
BuildAtlasRecommendationReconciliationPacket records the source reason values and a continuation_reason_agreement flag.
ValidateAtlasRecommendationReconciliationPacket rejects stale reason fields and mismatched agreement flags.
Reconciliation schema, production readiness, and stale Command fixture require the agreement readback.
